summary: Dashboard mobile narrow layout successfully implements the authenticated app interface with proper navigation and content structure. Minor palette deviation in CTA button treatment affects visual consistency but doesn't break core functionality.

violations.description: The 'Resend verification email' button uses a darker pink/purple fill instead of the specified diner button pink (#ffb3c7), deviating from the required CTA treatment

actions: Update the verification email CTA button to use the correct diner pink (#ffb3c7) fill color with proper border and shadow treatment
Verify that all primary CTA buttons in authenticated routes maintain consistent diner button styling
